sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_xml_data (id INT PRIMARY KEY, xml_content XML);
INSERT INTO test_xml_data (id, xml_content) VALUES (2, '<root><element>Another Test</element></root>');
SELECT xte_node(xml_content, 'element') AS element_value FROM test_xml_data WHERE id BETWEEN 1 AND 2;
SELECT id, xte_node(xml_content, 'element') AS element_value FROM test_xml_data WHERE xte_node(xml_content, 'element') IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, COUNT(*) AS total_nodes FROM (SELECT xte_node(xml_content, 'element') FROM test_xml_data WHERE id BETWEEN 1 AND 2) AS subquery GROUP BY id HAVING total_nodes > 0;
CREATE TABLE test_numbers (num INT, str_value VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO test_numbers (num, str_value) VALUES (1, '100'), (2, '200'), (3, NULL);
SELECT num, str_value, (num + CAST(str_value AS INT)) AS total FROM test_numbers WHERE str_value IS NOT NULL AND total BETWEEN 300 AND 500;
SELECT id, COUNT(xte_node(xml_content, 'element')) AS node_count FROM test_xml_data GROUP BY id HAVING node_count > (SELECT AVG(COUNT(*)) FROM test_xml_data);
SELECT str_value, (num BETWEEN 1 AND 3) AS is_in_range FROM test_numbers WHERE str_value IS NOT NULL ORDER BY is_in_range DESC;
